name: spicetify-agent-skill
description: Portable /spicetify skill and dry-run-first helper CLI for safe local Spicetify workflows.

agent-skills-cli.installLocal: npx skills add <repo-checkout> --skill spicetify -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot opencode
agent-skills-cli.install: npx skills add github:wyattowalsh/spicetify-agent-skill@v0.1.0 --skill spicetify -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot opencode
